title: neocalyptrocalyx surinamensis
intro: Neocalyptrocalyx surinamensis, also known as the Surinam calyptra, is a species of flowering plant in the family Celastraceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Neocalyptrocalyx surinamensis include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Neocalyptrocalyx surinamensis typically involve infusions or decoctions of the leaves, which can be consumed as teas or taken as supplements to reap its medicinal benefits.
